q: A notebook and a pen cost $12.50 together. The notebook costs $10 more than the pen. What is the price of the pen in dollars?
Three machines make 3 widgets in 3 minutes. How many minutes does it take 100 machines to make 100 widgets?
Fence posts are placed every 5 meters along a straight 100-meter fence line, with a post at both ends. How many posts are there?
A snail climbs 3 meters each day and slips back 2 meters each night. The well is 10 meters deep. On which day (a number) does it first reach the top?
What is the remainder when 2^10 is divided by 7?
A clock takes 5 seconds to strike 6 times (the first strike is at time zero). How many seconds does it take to strike 12 times?
You drive 60 km at 30 km/h and return the same 60 km at 60 km/h. What is your average speed for the round trip, in km/h?
In a race, you overtake the runner in second place. What place are you now in? Answer with a single word or number.
Two fair six-sided dice are rolled. What is the probability their sum is 9, as a fraction in lowest terms?
A rope ladder hangs over the side of a ship with rungs 30 cm apart and 10 rungs above the water. The tide rises 90 cm. How many rungs are above the water now?
January 1 falls on a Tuesday in a non-leap year. What day of the week is March 1? Answer with the day name.
What is the sum of the interior angles of a convex polygon with 12 sides, in degrees?
Worker A can finish a job alone in 6 hours; worker B alone in 3 hours. Working together at constant rates, how many hours do they take?
Between 12:00 noon and 12:00 midnight, how many times do a clock's hour and minute hands point in exactly the same direction? Count the overlap at noon itself, but not the one at midnight.
What is the smallest positive integer that leaves remainder 3 when divided by 5, and remainder 4 when divided by 7?
25 teams play a single-elimination tournament (one loss and you are out, no ties). How many games are played to decide the champion?
What is the units digit of 7^2026?
A shirt priced at $80 is discounted by 25%, and the sale price is then increased by 25%. What is the final price in dollars?
How many integers from 1 to 1000 inclusive are divisible by neither 2 nor 5?
A father is now 4 times as old as his son. In 20 years he will be twice as old as his son. How old is the son now, in years?

Three cards: one is red on both sides, one is red on one side and blue on the other, one is blue on both sides. You draw one at random and see a red face up. What is the probability the other side is also red, as a fraction in lowest terms?
A book's pages are numbered starting from 1, using 792 digits in total. How many pages does the book have?
Water lilies on a pond double their covered area every day and cover the whole pond on day 48. On which day was the pond exactly half covered?
At a meeting, each of 12 people shakes hands exactly once with every other person. How many handshakes occur in total?
